category_sources: source_facts.description says it defines committing rules; official README describes commit message standardization, version bumping, and changelog generation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is commitizen; official documentation and GitHub README use Commitizen.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links the Commitizen Documentation Site at commitizen-tools.github.io/commitizen.
repo_sources: Official documentation homepage and GitHub README identify commitizen-tools/commitizen as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe standardized commit messages, Conventional Commits, version bumping, changelog generation, Git, and CLI commands.
